title: C++17 Artifact Request
body_tail:
IB generators; tab10 repeated 173e27a5 compile-fail block; tab11 repeated 579eb162 sample-fail block). Also, the only new recent candidate 19906036 (hash 5131d2d625b0) scored Accepted (0), 5/7, so that route is also dead.

Current best remains 81.938904. Target is 91.80+. You must hard-pivot away from all known plateau/duplicate/score-zero families. Think longer and implement a materially different complete solution. Use attached files and repo https://github.com/lequoctran181/IMC_Challenge_2026 . Prioritize a real +10 point route: fixed final-test family fingerprinting, safe mesh-specific constructors, vertex-only Hausdorff exploitation that still keeps SSIM >=0.9, or another genuinely new algorithm. 

Return exactly one complete standalone ready-to-submit C++17 source in one 
cpp block. It must compile with C++17 and pass the official sample first line exactly `8 12`. No snippets, no repeated generators, no patch-only/prose-only answer, no attachment-only answer.

Show more


Thought for 7m 41s
I






Round18 feedback: duplicate again. Your answer repeated old round5/round13 C++ blocks, no new compile/sample candidate. Current best remains 81.938904; target 91.80+. Recent new hashes 5131d2d and 2cb2e4a scored 0 and 30.004622. Stop returning known blocks. Return exactly one new complete standalone C++17 
cpp block, compileable, official sample first line `8 12`, materially different.


Thought for 7m 36s
I



Pro Extended



ChatGPT can make mistakes. Check important info.

blocks.text:
cd IMC_Challenge_2026
python3 make_vxh_breakthrough.py -o vxh_breakthrough.cpp
wc -c vxh_breakthrough.cpp
./vxh_breakthrough < sample.in | head -n1
# submit vxh_breakthrough.cpp
python code block. Do not attach a file, do not summarize, do not omit any lines. I need the runnable generator source text here so I can compile/sample/submit immediately.

python3 make_k3_guarded.py -o k3_guarded_breakthrough.cpp
wc -c k3_guarded_breakthrough.cpp
./k3_guarded_breakthrough < sample.in | head -n1

python3 make_c5r_exact_best.py -o c5r_exact_best_breakthrough.cpp
wc -c c5r_exact_best_breakthrough.cpp
./c5r_exact_best_breakthrough < sample.in | head -n1

python3 make_srf_exact_best.py -o srf_exact_best_breakthrough.cpp
wc -c srf_exact_best_breakthrough.cpp
./srf_exact_best_breakthrough < sample.in | head -n1

cpp block. It must compile with g++ -O2 -std=c++17 -pipe -static -s and pass official sample first line exactly `8 12`.

Current real best is still 81.938904; target is 91.80+. Recent results: 19905603 and 19905630 tied best, 19905643 scored 52.608857, 19905803 scored 0. We need a genuinely different +10-point strategy, not snippets, not current-best wrappers, not duplicate failed blocks.

Use attached files and repo history: https://github.com/lequoctran181/IMC_Challenge_2026 . Output only the full final C++ code block.
cpp block. It must compile with C++17 and pass the official sample first line exactly `8 12`. No snippets, no repeated generators, no patch-only/prose-only answer, no attachment-only answer.
cpp block, compileable, official sample first line `8 12`, materially different.
